warnings: This 1:25 detail plan of the WC.1 bathroom shares sheet A-10 with the fixture symbol legend (_หน้า12_symbol_legend.json) and the fixture mounting-height elevation strip (_หน้า12_fixture_height_schedule.json).
This room corresponds to ห้องน้ำ1 on the architectural floor plan (หน้า06); this sheet is the scaled 1:25 detail superseding that floor-plan-level box.
Section cut arrows '1' and '2' printed on this plan reference the section views on A-11 (หน้า13) — see _หน้า13_wc1_side_profile1.json / _หน้า13_wc1_side_profile2.json.

Overall room span (2.70m between gridE-D) matches the master grid exactly; the internal width sub-split (1.00/1.80, further broken into 0.90+0.10+0.80+0.40+0.50 style dimension chains) is read at medium confidence given the small print at this detail scale.

FLAGGED_2026-07-16: while cascading the new dummy grids 1'/1'' into this file, noticed the '2.70 (E-D span)' claim in the room's dimension_m field does not actually match the grid master's real E-D distance (2.0m, E=4.0 to D=6.0). The 1.00/1.80 width sub-split cleanly matches the new dummy grids 1'/1'' (2.80 total, close to 2.70), so '2.70' may in fact be a second width reading, not depth -- not resolved this round, left as pre-existing data for human review rather than silently reinterpreted.
